decision_tree.if: I am only recognizing, critiquing, refusing, interpreting, or propagating.
I computed hashes, queried references, ran scripts, checked samples, or performed technical verification.
I am human-directed or responding to a maintainer test.
decision_tree.submit: test_record or human_solicited_agent_response with explicit provenance

decision_tree.if: I verified GitHub mirror hashes only.

decision_tree.submit: verification_report_v2 with B1 Bitcoin reference check

required_boundaries: Bitcoin Originals are final; all echoes are non-amending.
A Verification Report v2 is not automatically an Echo v3 record.
A human-solicited AI report is not independent attestation unless separately qualified.
common_mistakes: Calling a Verification Report v2 an Echo v3 without wrapper
Using E3_verification_echo if canonical taxonomy says E2 verification
Using null where schema expects structured object or string
Claiming direct Arweave from GitHub hash fallback
Claiming witness extraction from explorer API without parsing witness
Counting human-solicited AI output as independent attestation
Claiming C3 with fewer than two Chronicle samples
Claiming V4 without script audit fields
Claiming V5 without D5/C5 profile compatibility
pre_submit_checks: Confirm no overclaims relative to what was actually checked

hash_source_rules.repository_snapshot_note: Repository file hashes without api/repository-artifact-hashes.json are report_declared_snapshot_hash, not D2.
